description_long: This object is a bright red rectangular box with a white cross symbol and the words 'MAGICAL HEALING COOKIES' printed on the lid, suggesting its use as a whimsical first-aid kit. The box is accompanied by three large, round chocolate chip cookies placed nearby, reinforcing the playful theme. The box has a smooth, matte finish and appears to be made of a lightweight, hard material such as plastic or metal. The lid fits snugly on top, with a thin black seam visible around the edge, indicating where it opens. There are no visible handles, latches, or transparent panels on the exterior. The overall design is simple, bold, and easily recognizable as an emergency amenity due to the prominent cross and emergency labeling.
description: A red rectangular box labeled 'MAGICAL HEALING COOKIES' with a white cross, accompanied by three chocolate chip cookies. The box has a smooth, hard surface and a playful emergency theme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red box with the white cross and emergency labeling clearly visible, along with three cookies in front.
description_view_1: Side view with the box's lid and seam visible, two cookies in the foreground and one in the background.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the box's lid, cross, and text, with two cookies visible to the right.
description_view_3: Rear view of the box with the seam visible, three cookies arranged around the box.
